title: flotovia excelsa
intro: Flotovia excelsa, also known as the "Sky Flower", is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Flotovia excelsa include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
